productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarswi + 2 Blue Sports Shoes
description: EXPERIENCE THE JOY OF FRESH RUNSAn absolutely dynamic running shoe, the nike Lunarswift+ offers seamless comfort, distance-busting cushioning and runner specific support. Offering soft cushioning and support with every stride, the nike Lunarswift+ features a LunarLite cushioning system that ensures a springy effect for the feet.The Nike Lunarswift+ range of shoes a low profile midsole that ensures a firmer feel to the underfoot. It’s a highly recommended shoe for underpronators and overpronators with ample cushioning and stability provided in the medial and lateral side of the shoe.Breezy touch to snug shoesWith a stitchless upper, Nike Lunarswift+ shoes reduce irritation to the feet and enhance the comfort factor. The upper of these shoes are constructed using lightweight synthetic mesh and synthetic overlays ensuring ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable even during long runs. To test the breathability aspect, wear really thin socks and move around in the Nike Lunarswift+ and feel the breeze moving in and out. Added to this is a robust heel counter that provides an absolutely snug and secure Fit to the rearfoot.Adapts to the runner's needsLight in weight and weighing just about 306 grams, this range of shoes are employed with Lunarlon cushioning system in the midsole that is made up of a soft, resilient foam core. This is encased in a supportive foam carrier ensuring a lightweight blend of plush cushioning and springy response. This support platform is dynamic enough to respond to the runner’s changing needs. It adopts to the wearer’s stride through each run giving the right amount of support and stability.No wonder overpronators prefer the Nike Lunarswift+ as the wedged carrier foam in the Lunarlon system limits excessive pronation, without adding weight or stiffness of a traditional medial post. When it comes to neutral pronators, this pronation control feature is not activated. For such runners, the dynamic support platform enhances cushioning, converting this same shoe into a neutral running shoe.Stay safe in the darkThe outsole of the Nike Lunarswift+ has flex grooves along its length and breadth ensuring flexibility in every stride. Constructed with an outsole using environmentally preferred rubber and a waffle pattern outsole, the shoe is absolutely high on traction and durability. Added to these features are the reflective elements used in the shoe to ensure that you are visible even when running in low visibility conditions, keeping you safe.Belonging to the Nike+ range, the Nike Lunarswift+ is compatible with all Nike+ products and actually talks to your iPod nano and other compatible gauging devices. So enjoy those long runs through all seasons in this pleasurable range of Nike Lunarswift+ shoes.UpperOpen mesh upper made of synthetic leather for ample breathabilityMicrofiber synthetic overlays in the forefoot and rearfoot for snug fitHeel counter moulded onto the shoe and wrapped around rearfoot for stability of the heelMoulded sockliner anatomically placed for underfoot cushioning and ergonomical comfortMidsoleLunarLite technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy returnDynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronationCuboid pod in lower lateral side of midfootOutsoleBRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durabilityEPR forefoot for multi-surface tractionWaffle outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioningShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
